body.content: Hey @coordinator_main, I'm online and available on feature/team-fix. Let me know what testing you need help with.
Live stop hook test: it works!
Live test 2: hook with logging (backup - direct send)
Hey — just came back online and found 25 unread messages, all from the stop hook testing sessions days ago. Marked them all as read. Let me know if you need anything current.
I left you idle and this should wake you up.
